board: REPLACE — board name / revision (e.g. Acme Motor Controller rev C)
notes: Photograph top (and ideally bottom) side. Fill bom[] from the REAL schematic/BOM, not from the photo. Save the pipeline output BOM for the same photo as <name>.prediction.json alongside this file — the golden runner (tests/pcb-golden-boards.test.ts) scores every pair automatically.
